name: mappamind
description: Set up local architecture baselines and render grounded before/after impact cards for AI coding sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Show what an agent session changed in your architecture.
interface.longDescription: Mappamind guides first-run baseline setup, records a before snapshot at session start, renders a grounded before/after shift card at stop, and surfaces local Studio/card URLs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Set up Mappamind for this workspace.
